name: Criminal Complaint / Report to Authorities
description: A formal written complaint addressed to law enforcement or a district attorney requesting an investigation into an alleged crime.
content:
TO THE {{jurisdiction_name}}

Criminal Investigation Division

COMPLAINANT / VICTIM:
Name: {{complainant_name}}
ID / SSN: {{complainant_id}}
Address: {{complainant_address}}
Phone: {{complainant_phone}}

SUSPECT / ACCUSED:
{{suspect_info}}

ALLEGED OFFENSE: {{offense_type}}

DATE OF INCIDENT: {{formatDate incident_date}}

STATEMENT OF FACTS:

{{incident_summary}}

EVIDENCE PROVIDED:

{{evidence_list}}, alongside any potential witness testimonies and other lawful evidence to be discovered during the investigation.

RELIEF SOUGHT / REQUEST FOR INVESTIGATION:
For the reasons explained above, I respectfully request that a formal criminal investigation be initiated against the suspect(s) named herein, and that appropriate legal action and/or criminal charges be brought forward in the interest of justice.

Date: {{formatDate petition_date}}

Complainant: {{complainant_name}}


Signature: _________________________

fields.name: jurisdiction_name
fields.label: Name of Authority
fields.placeholder: e.g., District Attorney's Office of New York, NYPD

fields.name: suspect_info
fields.label: Suspect Information
fields.placeholder: Name, address, or 'Unknown Individual' if identity is unknown.

fields.name: incident_summary
fields.label: Detailed Summary of the Incident
fields.placeholder: Describe what happened chronologically and factually.

fields.name: evidence_list
fields.label: List of Evidence
fields.placeholder: e.g., Bank statements, Screenshots, Video recordings
